nodes.context: Serbian mafia group based in Zemun, Belgrade, involved in drug trafficking, kidnapping, murder, and racketeering.
Belgrade-based organized car theft group, later turned legitimate with a road construction company.
Serbian paramilitary unit with ties to the Zemun Clan, dissolved after Đinđić assassination.

edges.context: Zemun Clan initially operated under or in cooperation with Surčin Clan, later became autonomous.
Zemun Clan attempted to assassinate Surčin leader Ljubiša Buha twice in 2002.
Zemun Clan recruited veterans and commander Milorad Ulemek from the Special Operations Unit.
